    The Community

    Join our Telegram group to share ideas, ask questions, and explore the future of generative art with fellow creators, collectors, and coders.
    Connect

    Contact Info

    • Rue François-Versonnex 17BIS, 1207 Geneva, Switzerland
    • info@generatedart.com
    • Week Days: 09.00 to 18.00 Sunday: Closed

    Where Gen Art Comes Together

    Connect Collect




    Collecting Formats

    Discover. Connect. Collect.

    Connect with a like minded community. Collectors can acquire unique generative art digitally via Telegram or visit our Geneva gallery to purchase physical artworks and plug-and-play USB dongles, bridging digital innovation with tangible experience.

    Art Gallery

    Come to our Geneva gallery to buy original physical generative artworks or convenient plug-and-play USB dongles preloaded with generative art.


    Visit Us

    Collect Instantly

    Collectors can purchase unique generative art NFTs easily through Telegram, providing a fast and accessible way to own exclusive digital pieces.


    Explore
    Partnerships

    Let's connect.

    Contact Us
    GeneratedArt is a vibrant community focused on generative art. With a gallery in Geneva, we showcase dynamic artworks and connect artists and collectors from around the world.

    Connect.
